title: Recent advances in the application of the burgess reagent in organic synthesis
author: M.Heravi, Majid
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-2.0
description: This review focuses on the recent applications of Burgess reagent in the synthesis of organic compounds, with the emphasis, on the total synthesis of natural occurring products .
steps_raw: This review focuses on the recent applications of Burgess reagent in the synthesis of organic compounds, with the emphasis, on the total synthesis of natural occurring products .
